title: Front Office Manager - EaseMyTrip - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - EaseMyTrip - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, EaseMyTrip in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
